croire.intro: Gold Coast Croire is Pronaj's agribusiness venture — one brand carrying Ghana's fertile coast to world markets. Premium growing substrate, greenhouse produce and value-added processing, built on the trade infrastructure Pronaj already operates.
croire.whyBody: Croire is French for believe. The Gold Coast fed empires long before it exported gold — we believe its soil is still the region's most undervalued asset. Croire is our commitment to prove it: patient capital, precision agriculture, and a brand worthy of the coast it grows on.

substrate.title: Cocopeat Substrate
substrate.desc: Premium washed and buffered cocopeat, processed from Ghanaian coconut husk and compressed for export.

greenhouse.title: Greenhouse Produce
greenhouse.desc: Precision-grown vegetables under climate control — consistent quality, year-round supply.

processing.title: Value-Added Processing
processing.desc: Moving up the chain: drying, grading and packaging at origin so more value stays in Ghana.

logistics.title: Export & Trade Logistics
logistics.desc: Consolidated cold-chain and dry-cargo routes from Tema to Europe and the Middle East.

phase1.title: Explore
phase1.desc: Validate crops, partners and demand across target markets. Secure certifications and land partnerships.

phase2.title: Pilot
phase2.desc: First branded shipments under Gold Coast Croire. Greenhouse expansion and initial processing lines.

phase3.title: Scale
phase3.desc: Full processing capacity, a regional sourcing network, and Croire on shelves across three continents.

croire.disclaimer: Targets reflect Pronaj's development plan for the Croire brand, not current production.
croire.ctaBody: We are in conversation with distributors, growers and investors across Europe and the Middle East. If the Gold Coast belongs in your supply chain, let's talk.
